aesthetic: Obsidian — gem-like dark layers, European grotesque, monochrome glow
principles: No drop shadows on dark surfaces — use 1px borders instead
Purple-blue #5e6ad2 only for highlights and interaction states
Changelog voice:陈述句, no exclamations, technical terms welcome
One visual focus per page, rest is breathing space
promptGuide: Apply the Obsidian aesthetic: Familjen Grotesk display (weight 500, letter-spacing -0.03em), dark layers via luminance (#08090a base → #141414 cards → #1a1a1a hover), #5e6ad2 purple-blue only for highlights (never fills), 1px top border gradient (#5e6ad2 → transparent) on cards for 'liquid light' effect, text #f7f8f8 (not pure white), changelog tone (no 'we', no exclamations, backticks for tech terms).
